channel.title: Earth Structure on Yasunori SAWAKI
channel.description: Recent content in Earth Structure on Yasunori SAWAKI

item.title: Seismological Structures on Bimodal Distribution of Deep Tectonic Tremor
item.description: This finding was published in Geophysical Research Letters on March 31, 2021. Please refer to the article below for details. Sawaki, Y., Y. Ito, K. Ohta, T. Shibutani, and T. Iwata, (2021). Seismological structures on bimodal distribution of deep tectonic tremor.
